mapper.select:
/* INHOUSE_SNPW_Dao_retrieveInhouseSnpwList */ WITH DATE_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4) || '0101', 'yyyyMMdd') + LEVEL - 1, 'yyyyMMdd') AS dt FROM DUAL CONNECT BY TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4) || '0101', 'yyyyMMdd') + LEVEL - 1, 'yyyyMMdd') <= SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 4) || '1231' ), MAPPING_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(BASIN DEPT BPLC USWTR_SQTY INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW DATE_LIST) */ DATE_LIST.dt, BASIN.cmmn_cd AS basin_cd, BASIN.cmmn_cd_nm AS basin_nm, BASIN.sort_ordr AS basin_sort, DEPT.cmmn_cd AS dept_cd, DEPT.cmmn_cd_nm AS dept_nm, DEPT.sort_ordr AS dept_sort, BPLC.cmmn_cd AS bplc_cd, BPLC.cmmn_cd_nm AS bplc_nm, BPLC.sort_ordr AS bplc_sort, INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW.cmmn_cd AS inhouse_cnsmp_snpw_cd, INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW.cmmn_cd_nm AS inhouse_cnsmp_snpw_cd_nm, INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW.usr_dfn_vu1 AS inhouse_cnsmp_eqp_cpcty, INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW.sort_ordr AS inhouse_cnsmp_snpw_cd_sort FROM ( SELECT cls_cd, cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, upper_cls_cd, upper_cmmn_cd, sort_ordr FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_1000' ) BASIN, ( SELECT cls_cd, cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, upper_cls_cd, upper_cmmn_cd, sort_ordr FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2001' ) DEPT, ( SELECT cls_cd, cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, upper_cls_cd, upper_cmmn_cd, usr_dfn_vu1, sort_ordr FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2002' ) BPLC, ( SELECT cls_cd, cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, upper_cls_cd, upper_cmmn_cd, usr_dfn_vu1, sort_ordr FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2011' ) INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW, DATE_LIST WHERE INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW.upper_cls_cd = BPLC.cls_cd AND INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW.upper_cmmn_cd = BPLC.cmmn_cd AND BPLC.upper_cls_cd = DEPT.cls_cd AND BPLC.upper_cmmn_cd = DEPT.cmmn_cd AND DEPT.upper_cls_cd = BASIN.cls_cd AND DEPT.upper_cmmn_cd = BASIN.cmmn_cd
AND BASIN.cmmn_cd = #{ecsBasinDivCd}
AND DEPT.cmmn_cd = #{ecsChrgDeptId}
AND BPLC.cmmn_cd = #{ecsCnstscDivCd}
ORDER BY basin_sort, dept_sort, bplc_sort, inhouse_cnsmp_snpw_cd_sort ), INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW_DATA_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(A B) */ A.dt, A.bplc_cd, NVL(SUM(B.msmt_vu), 0) AS inhouse_cnsmp_snpw FROM ( SELECT dt, MAX(bplc_cd) AS bplc_cd, inhouse_cnsmp_snpw_cd FROM MAPPING_LIST GROUP BY dt, inhouse_cnsmp_snpw_cd ) A, ( SELECT obsr_de AS dt, tag_seq, SUM(msmt_vu) AS msmt_vu FROM WRO.ti_rwis_dd WHERE tag_seq IN ( SELECT DISTINCT inhouse_cnsmp_snpw_cd FROM MAPPING_LIST ) AND obsr_de BETWEEN ( SELECT MIN(dt) FROM DATE_LIST ) AND ( SELECT MAX(dt) FROM DATE_LIST ) GROUP BY obsr_de, tag_seq ) B WHERE A.inhouse_cnsmp_snpw_cd = B.tag_seq(+) AND A.dt = B.dt GROUP BY A.dt, A.bplc_cd )
SELECT
sty || '년' AS ymd,
std || '일' AS ymd,
ROUND(mon01, 0) AS mon01, ROUND(mon02, 0) AS mon02, ROUND(mon03, 0) AS mon03, ROUND(mon04, 0) AS mon04, ROUND(mon05, 0) AS mon05, ROUND(mon06, 0) AS mon06, ROUND(mon07, 0) AS mon07, ROUND(mon08, 0) AS mon08, ROUND(mon09, 0) AS mon09, ROUND(mon10, 0) AS mon10, ROUND(mon11, 0) AS mon11, ROUND(mon12, 0) AS mon12, ROUND(( NVL(mon01, 0) + NVL(mon02, 0) + NVL(mon03, 0) + NVL(mon04, 0) + NVL(mon05, 0) + NVL(mon06, 0) + NVL(mon07, 0) + NVL(mon08, 0) + NVL(mon09, 0) + NVL(mon10, 0) + NVL(mon11, 0) + NVL(mon12, 0) ), 0) AS total FROM ( SELECT
SUBSTR(dt, 0, 4) AS sty,
SUBSTR(dt, 7, 2) AS std,
SUBSTR(dt, 5, 2) AS stm, SUM(inhouse_snpw_elyrs) AS inhouse_snpw_elyrs FROM ( SELECT /* LEADING(MAPPING_LIST INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW_DATA_LIST) */ MAPPING_LIST.dt, MAPPING_LIST.basin_nm, MAPPING_LIST.dept_nm, MAPPING_LIST.bplc_nm, MAPPING_LIST.bplc_cd, MAPPING_LIST.basin_sort, MAPPING_LIST.dept_sort, MAPPING_LIST.bplc_sort, NVL(INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW_DATA_LIST.inhouse_cnsmp_snpw, 0) AS inhouse_snpw_elyrs FROM MAPPING_LIST, INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW_DATA_LIST WHERE MAPPING_LIST.bplc_cd = INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW_DATA_LIST.bplc_cd(+) AND MAPPING_LIST.dt = INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW_DATA_LIST.dt(+) ) GROUP BY
SUBSTR(dt, 0, 4),
SUBSTR(dt, 7, 2),
SUBSTR(dt, 5, 2) ) PIVOT ( MAX(inhouse_snpw_elyrs) FOR stm IN ( '01' AS mon01, '02' AS mon02, '03' AS mon03, '04' AS mon04, '05' AS mon05, '06' AS mon06, '07' AS mon07, '08' AS mon08, '09' AS mon09, '10' AS mon10, '11' AS mon11, '12' AS mon12 ) ) ORDER BY
sty
std
